control.description: Controls provide a user-friendly way to input a value that can affect other parts of the doc

formula.description: Formulas can be great for performing one-off computations

table.description: Access data of tables in documents

view.description: Access data of views in documents

getAllColumns.description: Get all columns in a table

getAllRows.description: Get all rows in a table

docId.description: ID of the doc. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

tableId.description: The table to get the row from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

disableParsing.description: Whether the API will not attempt to parse the data in any way

keyColumns.description: Optional column IDs, URLs, or names (fragile and discouraged), specifying columns to be used as upsert keys. If more than one separate by a comma (,).

rawData.description: Whether to return the data exactly in the way it got received from the API

useColumnNames.description: Whether to use column names instead of column IDs in the returned output. This is generally discouraged as it is fragile. If columns are renamed, code using original names may throw errors.

valueFormat.description: The format that cell values are returned as

query.description: Query used to filter returned rows, specified as <column_id_or_name>:<value>. If you'd like to use a column name instead of an ID, you must quote it (e.g., "My Column":123). Also note that value is a JSON value; if you'd like to use a string, you must surround it in quotes (e.g., "groceries").

sortBy.description: Specifies the sort order of the rows returned. If left unspecified, rows are returned by creation time ascending.

visibleOnly.description: Whether to return only visible rows and columns for the table

rowId.description: The view to get the row from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

columnId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

formulaId.description: The formula to get the row from

controlId.description: The control to get the row from

viewId.description: The view to get the row from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

keyName.description: The view to get the row from
